hooks.command: $projectDir = $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; if (-not $projectDir) { exit 0 }; $logDir = Join-Path $projectDir '.claude/logs'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $logDir | Out-Null; $input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($input) { try { $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $ts = Get-Date -Format o; $sessionId = if ($data.session_id) { $data.session_id } else { '' }; $cmd = if ($data.tool_input -and $data.tool_input.command) { $data.tool_input.command } else { '' }; $line = '{"ts":"' + $ts + '","session":"' + $sessionId + '","cmd":"' + ($cmd -replace '"', '\\
